ticket_log_private_message_title: Greetings {username}! You ticket has been closed.
ticket_log_private_message:
Your ticket on the server {serverName} with the ID {ticketId} has been closed. You may re-open it in the linked thread via the button below. A comprehensive log of your ticket conversation is provided in the attached file.
If not re-opened your ticket will be deleted in 7 days.

**`Ticket already closed`**

This ticket already has been closed. 
You can re-open it, if you have more questions.

**`Ticket already open`**

This ticket already has been re-opened. 
You're welcome to send your message or close the ticket with the button below.

welcome_message_text:
You've found your way to the community discord server for the Minecraft world of Sypher: Esylda! Dive in to chat, showcase your latest builds, share your ideas, and find new friends for your next quest. 
Check out the buttons below for the rules and more information about our project on our website. 
 
Enjoy your stay!
welcome_message_links:
**Sypher Links**
**➜ Permanent Invite** - [.gg/7vgP24RjGS](https://discord.gg/7vgP24RjGS)
**➜ Sypher Website** - https://sypher-project.com
**➜ Esylda Website (MC)** - https://esylda.com
server_rules_text:
**Follow Discord's ToS and Community Guidelines.** 
➜ [Discord's Terms of Service](https://discord.com/terms)
➜ [Discord's Community Guidelines](https://discord.com/guidelines) 
 
If you have any staff complaints, please message an <@&1344652060502790255>. 
If you see something that violates the rules or makes you uncomfortable, you can report it to our <@&1344651864842698762> through direct messages.
rule_text_1: Use common sense. We do not allow toxicity, harassment, impersonation of other members. If you have issues with another member of the discord server, take it to DM's. Ensure that chat is as inclusive as possible. Do not spam messages or mentions. Respect everyone's choice regarding mentions.
rule_text_2: Use the correct channels. Refer to channel's description. If you can't find the information you're looking for, tag the bot!
rule_text_3: Your name must be mentionable, readable and appropriate. This means that your name should not contain only digital characters that cannot be easily typed, excessive use of symbols, or have a hateful meaning.
rule_text_4: We adhere to Discord ToS. Make sure you are aware of what Discord's ToS includes by reading them: https://discord.com/terms. (Using Better Discord goes against Discord's ToS.)
rule_text_5: Do not link or discuss NSFW or obscene content. This includes text, images, or links featuring nudity, sex, hard violence, or other graphically disturbing content.
rule_text_6: Avoid URL shorteners and risky links. Please, make sure that every link you send is easy to read and that people know what to expect by clicking it.
rule_text_7: Please also note: All of the above also applies to voice chats. If you decide to go against our rules in DMs, this decision must come from everyone involved, in a mutual agreement. This means you should not break any server rules in DM's, expect if both parties agree to this.
rule_text_8: Although you have to respect those rules, keep in mind that they are enforced according to their spirit and not their words. Although we may still take action if something you do is not explicitly wrote in the rules, this also means that in some situations, we may not strictly apply the rules.
rule_text_9: Do not fill empty or inapropriate application forms in our recruitment process. Doing so will result in a ban.
welcome_message_send: The welcome message was sent successfully.
presentation_text_1:
> Step into Esylda, a unique Minecraft server where your journey truly begins. We've crafted a world that blends the familiar charm of vanilla Minecraft with exciting new challenges and discoveries. 
 
**A World of Endless Possibilities** 
> Explore vast, diverse landscapes filled with never-before-seen creatures and hidden wonders. Whether you're a seasoned explorer, a master builder, or a daring adventurer, Esylda offers something for everyone. Gather unique resources, master new recipes, and forge your legend in a world constantly evolving. 
 
**Dive into a Vibrant Community** 
> Join fellow players in epic quests, collaborate on grand builds, or simply relax and share your experiences. Our world is designed to foster connection and provide endless opportunities for shared adventures. 
 
**Ready to write your own chapter in Esylda?**
log_channel_updated: Current channel set as log channel.

A message in channel {messageChannelName} with message id {messageId} has been edited. 
New content: {newMessageContent}

log_user_ban_remove: User {username} with ID {userId} was un-banned from {guildName} by {executorName}. The user was banned with reason: {reason}.

A message in channel {messageChannelName} was deleted.
